global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, all-black body and glossy feathers. It has a stout, slightly curved black beak and dark eyes. The wings are broad and rounded, and the tail is fan-shaped. The legs and feet are also black, giving it a uniform appearance.
spatial_relations: The beak is positioned at the front of the head
The wings extend from the sides of the body
The tail fans out at the rear
The legs are positioned beneath the body
